MOTION To File Amended Complt; Ntc Of Mo
Off Calendar Feb-24-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EMPLOYERS GROUP INC. AND APPLIED RISK SERVICES' Motion To File Amended Complaint: DENIED for insufficient notice. See the newly amended CCP 1005(b). This motion was not served 16 court days before the hearing date. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Set For Trial On May-23-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-04-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 604

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Chad Prentice, Esq., Maho & Prentice, (805) 962-1930, appearing through court call for Defendant and Moving Party Global Building Services
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT GLOBAL BUILDING SERVICES' MOTION TO TRANSFER (LOS ANGELES SUPERIOR COURT): DENIED; ANSWER TO BE FILED WITHIN 20 DAYS. Prevailing party to submit proposed order. (301/JLW/NI-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
